unit.note: server vitest 170 files / 1967 tests green + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). New preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts (16: drainStdio x3, treeKill x4, awaitExit x3, + 6 manager regressions) drives the REAL PreviewSessionManager through injected spawn/platform/processKill/killSpawn seams so no real taskkill or process-group signal fires against a host pid. preview-session-manager.test.ts net-neutral (killAll describe moved to the new file under injected seams; +in-flight-rejection retry test). No client/** change (all 4 changed files under server/src/core/). Diff-coverage remediation: added preview-child-lifecycle.branches.test.ts (19 tests) covering the moved port/readiness probes + treeKill win32/fallback edges + drainStdio setEncoding branch -> module 100% lines / 92% branch (was 60.6%); total server suite 171 files / 1986 passed + 1 skipped.

integration.note: The 6 manager regressions exercise the real spawn()/doSpawn() dedup wrapper, the real profile-change respawn (treeKill + awaitExit), the real killAll, and the real drainStdio wiring through the injected fake-spawn seam. RED-first proven by neutralizing each fix (seams kept): all 6 regressions FAIL on pre-fix behavior, 10 helper unit tests pass; restoring the fix -> 16/16 green.

e2e.note: No preview E2E run. D20 is server-side child-process lifecycle with NO UI-observable change (the Preview button + /preview route are unchanged; the fix makes the existing spawn drain/dedup/tree-kill correctly). Behavioral proof is the deterministic server regressions. The real cross-process taskkill/process.kill(-pid) against a live OS group is not unit-probeable (tests must not kill real host groups) -> the platform seam is unit-verified and the real spawn path is unchanged from D03; post-merge :3847 smoke (click Preview, switch profiles, confirm no orphan node/cmd) is the real-stack proof.

surface_verification.justification: Server-side Preview dev-server child lifecycle (FR-01.17); no UI-observable change. Drain (F11): stdout/stderr consumed into a bounded ring so a full OS pipe can't freeze the child. Dedup (F12): concurrent Preview clicks coalesce onto one child (different profile serializes) so no untracked orphan leaks. Tree-kill (F13): killAll/respawn/cleanup terminate the whole npm->node group (win32 taskkill /T, POSIX kill(-pid)) and await the old child's exit before the respawn probe. Proof is the deterministic server regressions (preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 16 tests + preview-session-manager.test.ts) green on this win32 host and Linux CI via injected platform seams. No client/** file changed; the frontend-change detector only false-positives on the 'src/' substring inside 'server/src/'.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F11 (MEDIUM) - spawn drains stdout+stderr into a bounded ring so a never-read OS pipe buffer can't backpressure-freeze the child; the captured tail is attached to PreviewExitedEarlyError/PreviewTimeoutError
behaviors.evidence: preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 'F11: spawn drains...' (data listener attached to both streams) + 'F11: early-exit error carries the captured stderr tail' - RED on pre-fix (0 listeners / empty tail) -> GREEN. drainStdio x3 unit tests (attach, bounded tail, null-safe).

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F12 (MEDIUM) - two concurrent spawn() for the same project+profile coalesce onto a single child (no untracked orphan killAll can never reach)
behaviors.evidence: preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 'F12: concurrent spawn() ... coalesces' - RED on pre-fix main (spawn called twice) -> GREEN (once). Promise.all over two mgr.spawn() through the injected spawn seam.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F12 (MEDIUM) - a different-profile concurrent spawn serializes onto the in-flight start then respawns, tree-killing the old child instead of orphaning it
behaviors.evidence: preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 'F12: a different-profile concurrent spawn serializes + tree-kills the old child' - RED on pre-fix (old child never killed) -> GREEN (processKill(-pid) called, one live entry). Addresses the external-code-review serialization finding.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F13 (MEDIUM) - killAll and profile-change respawn tree-kill the whole npm->node group (win32 taskkill /pid /t /f, POSIX kill(-pid)); the transient in-spawn cleanup does too (the detached child would otherwise orphan its group)
behaviors.evidence: preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 'F13: killAll tree-kills...' + treeKill x4 unit (POSIX group, throw->fallback, win32 taskkill argv shell:false, no-pid fallback) - RED on pre-fix (only the direct child SIGTERMed) -> GREEN.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F13 (MEDIUM) - a profile-change respawn awaits the old child's exit before probing the new port (no race where the probe beats the port release)
behaviors.evidence: preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 'F13: a profile-change respawn waits for the old child to exit before probing' - RED on pre-fix (probe observes not-yet-exited) -> GREEN. awaitExit x3 unit (already-exited, later-exit, bounded timeout).

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression test is RED on pre-fix behavior and green after (defect actually reproduced)
behaviors.evidence: Neutralize+run cycle recorded: 6 manager regressions FAIL on pre-fix (drain/dedup/serialize/killAll/respawn/tail), 10 helper unit tests pass; restore -> 16/16 green.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full existing server suite stays green; no invariant/ADR regressed (ADR-044 shell:false, D03 win32 resolveSpawn wrapper preserved)
behaviors.evidence: 170 files / 1967 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts + preview-win32-resolve.test.ts (D03 guards) still green; oxlint + tsc clean.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within footprint (+2 cohesive files per campaign guardrail) and bloat baselines are not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.ts 392<=393, preview-session-manager.test.ts 341<=341, new preview-child-lifecycle.ts 228<300, preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts 292<300. Anti-ratchet hook clean.

behaviors.behavior: Regression - an in-flight spawn that rejects clears its map entry so the next Preview click retries (no poisoned dedup)
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.test.ts 'clears the in-flight entry when a spawn rejects, so the next click retries' - addresses the external-plan-review poisoned-promise finding.

test_completeness.note: 4 ACs (AC1-AC4) + 2 review-driven regressions, all tested. Enumeration basis = the sub-iterate spec's Acceptance Criteria; each maps to >=1 RED-first regression in preview-child-lifecycle.test.ts (findings F11/F12/F13).
